message:
fix: v2.7.23 - Add yoctocolors-cjs dependency and update to agentic-flow@1.8.5

- Added yoctocolors-cjs@^2.1.2 as explicit dependency to fix npx ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND
- Updated to agentic-flow@1.8.5 with fixed 'Enabled: true' log message
- Fixes inquirer dependency resolution issue in npx temporary directories

files.patch:

-VERSION="2.7.22"
+VERSION="2.7.23"
 
 # Determine the correct path based on how the script is invoked
 if [ -L "$0" ]; then
